entry.title: Re: How to post GI on the RF without TM?

Thank you and best regards, Geovana De <https://answers.sap.com/questions/13914008/header-texts-are-not-visible-in-outbound-delivery.html> Hi Gauta, could you please report a case to SAP to help you further? This seems need to be checked in your system.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud TM: prevent freight unit creation for PO (e.g. based on shipping condition)
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no further updates under the topic. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.  Best regards, Geovana

entry.title: Re: How to mass delete physical inventory documents on sap public cloud
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no further updates under the topic. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.  Best regards, Geovana

entry.title: Speaker Registration Now Open for SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 1st March 2025 – Business AI Edition
entry.content:
Learn more about the event in our announcement blog post.

Speaker Tracks for Your Proposal:

  1. Track 2: Building AI Applications on SAP BTP
    Delve into the technicalities of building AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Share how developers and architects can leverage SAP BTP to create impactful AI solutions that drive business value.
  2. Track 3: Business AI Solutions from the Ecosystem (Partners & Customers)
    Highlight successful AI solutions developed by SAP partners and customers. Present case studies, implementation experiences, and collaborative projects that demonstrate the innovative use of Business AI within the SAP ecosystem.
  3. Track 4: Embedded AI Across Solutions (SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and Other SAP Products)
    Explore how Embedded AI is integrated into various SAP products like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and CX. Discuss how these intelligent features are transforming business processes and enhancing user experiences.

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2025 1st Edition – Business AI Edition?

  • Showcase Your Expertise: Share your knowledge with an engaged audience of SAP professionals.
  • Network with Peers: Connect with fellow experts, partners, and SAP enthusiasts.
  • Gain Recognition: Boost your professional profile and gain visibility within the SAP community.

How to Register:

Ready to share your insights at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2025 – Business AI Edition?
Register here to become a speaker and contribute to one of the most anticipated SAP community events of the year.

Next Steps:

  1. Proposal Review: Our expert team will review your submission. If shortlisted, we will reach out for more details.
  2. Internal Review: After a thorough review, we will notify you about the next steps, including presentation formats and promotional details.

We look forward to your valuable contributions and hope to see you at SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2025 1st Edition!

Best regards,
Ranjeet

entry.title: how to create two outbound cremas idoc if same vendor is extended to two company codes
entry.content:
Hi, 

we want to create idoc based on company code in CREMAS message type if vendor is extended to two company codes then two separate messages should be created. Thanks

#CREMAS #SPLIT CREMAS OUTBOUND

entry.title: How to check and fix Error reading material ledger period records ? Message No. C+073
entry.content: We cannot post item stock for Goods movement type Z01 ?

entry.title: Re: LSMW with object 0070 and program RV14BTCI, XK15 and...
entry.content: CONCATENATE RESPECTING BLANKS

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA: The Grey Panther of Data Warehousing
entry.content:
Hi Philipp!

I echo most of your feelings .

Unfortunately Datasphere was a victim of SAP BW/4HANA and BW success and a lot of was expected and it has failed to live up to customers expectations .

This has SAP Customers looking at other modern day cloud platforms  which require significant effort, skill and good understanding of SAP ecosystem.

I am looking forward to Frank Riesner's announcement .

Cheers

Af

entry.title: Is SEO right for my business?
entry.content: Yes, SEO is essential for any business seeking online growth. HikeMyTraffic®, SEOValley, and WebFX help improve rankings, boost traffic, and increase conversions, making SEO a smart investment for long-term success.

entry.title: Re: Accounting document not getting generated for standar...
entry.content:
Hello Luiza,

Thank you for sharing the detailed insights on creating a standard return process with appropriate refund controls. However, I would like to clarify whether, after creating a return order with refund control - Decide later, the system generates an accounting entry for COGS after the PGR.

I am unable to find any accounting entries for COGS and would like to understand if the standard system provides entries for PGR. If it does, what controls are in place? If not, could you please suggest a workaround to address this?

Thank you!
Mandark R.

entry.title: MRP LIVE MD01N with MRP Controller selection
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to run MRP in MD01N with selection of MRP controller

PIR--FG(X)-100 QTY 

BOM FG(X)- component a,b,c,d  in which 3 components a,b,c are related to same MRP controller(001 Domestic) & 4th component d is related to different MRP controller(002 Imported).If I will input the FG code whose PIR is there & MRP controller (002 imported) the system is giving error for no planning file entries exists. My requirement is to run the MRP as per MRP controller(002 imported) whose level 1 FG demand exists in the system. If I input only MRP controller in selection screen(002 Imported) system will plan all such components which are having this mrp controller(002-imported) whether there FG demand exists or not in the period. And the MRP results of MRP live which one is the report like MD05.

entry.title: Re: Need to understand about SAP standard process while c...
entry.content:
For which version of SAP are you asking (please add a related SAP manageg tag)

  • Else look at online help for Slow or Non-Moving Materials or look for application such as F2137

entry.title: Re: Subaccount certificate renewal in SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Yes, the Cloud Connector configuration is not bound to any specific user.
You may change configurations including certificate renewals with any user who has appropriate administration privileges. Please see
https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/managing-subaccounts#prerequisites

entry.title: Re: Issue with HANA Cloud Instance in BTP
entry.content:
We are no longer facing this issue.

Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: Demand Driven Replenishment DDMRP in S/4 HANA- Configuration Setup
entry.content:
Hi,

What is logic for determination of procurement type in DD MRP. On what basis it is getting updated.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Export multi-page PDF when using responsive story
entry.content:
Hi @SteffenKoch ,

I tried exporting a responsive story, but only the visible area of the table was captured. However, when exporting with charts, everything appears correctly.

To export tables, you need to do it separately.

1. For table export only you can click on more action as highlighted area

2. Click on Export

3. You can export with appendix as well

Responsive stories adjust dynamically to different screen sizes but don’t support full-page PDF exports. If you need a full report, consider using a canvas layout instead.

Kindly upvote and accept if you find it useful.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Using SAP ByDesign's OData API to update WorkplaceAdd...
entry.content:
https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3234367

Looks like documentation is not released. Usually Application User Management - Service Explorer documentation is provided.

Your best recourse is to configure comm scen, download WSDL, and playaround with request payload.
Thanks,
Anand Shukla
anand@crossoverit.consulting

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub and SAP SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Has anyone heard of an option to read data from talent intelligence hub via odata API? We would like to use Skills in downstream systems. 

Kind regards 

Simon

entry.title: Step-by-Step Migration from SAP BW 7.5 to SAP BW/4HANA 2023 – with ECC 6.0 as Source System
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently running SAP BW 7.5 and have plans to migrate to SAP BW/4HANA 2023. Our strategy is to perform the migration step by step and module by module. Additionally, our SAP ECC 6.0 EHP8 system will continue to serve as a source system during this process.

I have a few questions regarding this migration and integration scenario:

  1. Module-by-Module Migration:

    • What are the recommended practices for migrating individual modules from BW 7.5 to BW/4HANA without disrupting the overall data flow?
    • Are there any known challenges or considerations when migrating data models, queries, and extraction processes module by module?

  2. Integration with ECC 6.0 as a Source:

    • What are the best approaches for integrating our ECC 6.0 system as a data source during and after the migration?
    • Can we continue using standard extractors and ODP configurations during this phased migration?

  3. Best Practices & Tools:

    • Are there specific SAP Notes, guides, or tools you recommend for a smooth transition from BW 7.5 to BW/4HANA in a step-by-step manner?
    • What are the performance considerations or strategies to mitigate any potential downtime or data inconsistencies during the migration process?

Any shared experiences, resources, or guidance on this phased migration approach would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your insights!

Best regards,
Amir

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint

entry.title: Re: OData Exploration with EPM Tutorial - ES5
entry.content:
The question title should be "How to show OK Code in SAP GUI for HTML", not "OData Exploration with EPM Tutorial - ES5".

See how these screenshots are embedded in the answer, see how it's much more convenient to see them immediately rather than providing the screenshots as hyperlinks.

entry.title: Re: OData Exploration with EPM Tutorial - ES5
entry.content: The question has been answered many times. See: https://www.google.com/search?q=How+to+show+OK+Code+in+SAP+GUI+for+HTML%20site:sap.com

entry.title: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track Sydney 2025, March 21
entry.content:
We’re excited to kick off the year with SAP Inside Track Sydney 2025, and speaker submissions are now open! This premier event is a great opportunity for SAP professionals, enthusiasts, and thought leaders to share their insights, innovations, and expertise with a dynamic community. Whether you're a seasoned speaker or a passionate first-timer, we invite you to be part of this first SAP Inside Track event of the year and contribute to an inspiring knowledge exchange!

Event Overview

 
Date: March 21, 2025 (1pm  - 5pm)
Location: Sydney
Venue:  SAP Australia, Level 13/1 Denison St, North Sydney NSW 2060

This community-driven event is all about learning, networking, and sharing insights with fellow SAP professionals, developers, and experts. After many year, we are changing the format to a half-day format to accomodate more topics and speakers from the #SAPCommunity. Expect some great content and discussions across different topics. 

Call for Speakers – We Want YOU!

Got something cool to share about SAP technologies and solutions? Whether you’re an experienced speaker or new to the stage, we’d love to hear from you!

Topics of Interest:

  • Enterprise Architecture 
  • RISE with SAP / GROW with SAP
  • Application Development & Automation
  • Data & Analytics 
  • Business AI & use cases relevant to businesses 

Why Speak at SAP Inside Track?

📌 Share Your Knowledge – Inspire the SAP community with your expertise.
📌 Expand Your Network – Meet and connect with fellow SAP professionals.
📌 Boost Your Profile – Gain recognition within the SAP ecosystem.
📌 Give Back to the Community – Contribute to SAP’s growing knowledge hub

How to Register

Submit your speaker proposal here by filling out the online form. If you have any questions, you can leave a comment below.

What Happens Next?

Our expert team reviews your proposal. If shortlisted, we’ll contact you for more details. Once the final selections are made, we’ll guide you through the next steps—presentation format, social media promotions, and more!  Don’t miss out—join us in making SAP Inside Track Sydney 2025 an unforgettable event!

We look forward to seeing you. Do subscribe to the Sydney Group to receive notifications of similar events.

entry.title: Mass SPRO Special Procurement Key config options
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a business requirement to change the Long text for all languages (Goto -> Translation) for Special Procurement Key (Plant & SPK combination).

However the combination records are 6800. Hence manual maintenance is more time consuming. I tried LSMW but it didn't work due to SPRO navigation and scroll.

Tried to debug T460T table and maintain, but the problem is when copied 6800 from excel and pass in table, it shows 13000 records. Means, if an SPK is used by another plant, it will obviously pull that as well. Which we don't want to change.

Hence is there any other option in STD or way to do this change in Mass.

Kindly let me know.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms: Display 2 long text side by side, each i...
entry.content:
Hi ,

Recently faced similar issue two standard texts side by side display and my issue resolved with below solution. 

I have created extra main page and new design view and design view should be positioned. in the properties check check box Allow Page Breaks With in Content. I have attached screen shot , please check for your reference.

Thank you

Raghav

entry.title: Re: How to get access to DEV environment login details wi...
entry.content: Thank you so much. However, when i accessed provisioning i discovered the the company ID for the DEV environment is not attached to my company. Any idea how i can do that

entry.title: Data Analyzer URL Parameter Rows / Columns
entry.content:
After hours of trying I managed to find the right syntax to open a Data Analyzer from Datasphere:

NavigationUtils.openDataAnalyzer("YYY","[XXX][][" + Table_1.getDataSource().getInfo().modelName +"]", [UrlParameter.create("systemType", "DATASPHERE"),UrlParameter.create("autoSubmit", "true")]);

YYY = the name of the connection to the datasphere. It can be found in the SAC menu under connections.

XXX = Datasphere Space Name in which the Analytical Model is located. The name can be found in the Datasphere menu under Spaces.

slightly unrelated:
if one wants to open an existing data analzyer via SAC script:

NavigationUtils.openDataAnalyzer("&/dz/TTT");

TTT = alphanumeric string from the data anlyzer url you want to open.

Now regarding my question. Does anyone know whether there are URL Parameters to tell the openDataAnalyzer which dimensions and measures to put into the rows and columns?

entry.title: Re: Validity Date for Sales Order
entry.content: In mass manufacturing, sales rates keep on changing periodically. In such case sales order validity will help in restricting picking of wrong rates in specific validity period. How to address this?

entry.title: MRP Group Planning horizon not considered even with NETPL
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Business wants to plan a specific Seasonal product only for 3 Months with MRP considering only 3 Months requirement.

I maintained "Planning Horizon - 90 days" in MRP group, assigned in MRP-1 and tried running MRP with Type - PD in both MD02, MD03 with NETPL - Processing key, Lot size -EX and Strategy - 10. I don't have Planning Horizon maintained in Plant Level as well. But still it considers the requirement even beyond 90 days and generate Planning proposals.

Am i missing something ?? Or any OSS to be implemented ?? Client use ECC system.

Kindly advise if any team.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Get the contracts list whose value is greater than 1...
entry.content:
Hi @ramsthota1986,

You can consider this option as well,

You can achieve this by measure input control 

1. Select Measure input and add range here I am added sale and order dimension for set up

2. You can filter as per your range Here I set 0-100

Range 100-500

Kindly upvote if you find it useful.

Thanks

entry.title: CDS $metadata 8.6.0 locally vs btp based deployment
entry.content:
We have a CAP 8.6.0 JS implementation. Locally the $metadata look different compared to the BTP based deployment. We have an entity which is annotated : 

annotate CustomerProfile @odata.draft.enabled;

Locally the Fiori Elements based App has no ''Create" button while remotly deployed it works correctly.

When we compare the metadata then locally it is different compared to the BTP deployment. 

Is there a way to see or debug how the $metadata gets composed , meaning which settings/annotations from which folder/file and sequence are being used ?

Best, Mike

entry.title: Re: Unable to create Bank Master data in Test environment...
entry.content:
Dear Aagarwal,

 

Regarding the issue, kindly refer to KBA 3559660 - Error 'You are not authorized to create new bank account.' in app Manage Bank Accounts

 

 

Best Regards,

Priyanka

entry.title: Introducing SAP CPQ Product Rest API available
entry.content:
Note

  • Product Translations field not available yet
  • Standard Integration Package is not available yet

SAP CPQ introduces from 2502 release Product REST API which includes the following operations: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, BULK INSERT, BULK UPDATE, and BULK DELETE. 

To Create Simple Product

 

### 
POST {{new_url}}/api/product/v1/Products
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

{
     "basicInfo": {
     "isNewVersion": null,
     "isActiveVersion": true,
     "systemId": "Metal_cpq",
     "name": "Metal",
     "aliasParentSystemId": "",
     "displayType": "Simple",
     "configurationType": "Standard",
     "productType": {
     "systemId": "Service_cpq",
     "name": "Service",
     "rank": 0
     },
     "catalogCode": "Silver",
     "unitOfMeasure": "EA",
     "description": "",
     "categories": [
     {
          "systemId": "Equipment_cpq",
          "name": "Equipment",
          "rank": 0,
          "parentSystemId": null,
          "parentName": null,
          "productBelongsToCategory": true
     }
     ],
     "image": "",
     "alternativeText": "",
     "displayTypePricing": "CustomPricing",
     "pricingCode": "",
     "price": 100.0000,
     "costBuilder": "",
     "priceBuilder": "",
     "baseRecurringPrice": 0.0000000000,
     "recurringPriceFormula": "",
     "recurringCostFormula": "",
     "recurringPricePeriodFormula": "",
     "recurringCostPeriodFormula": "",
     "isProductUsingAlternativePricing": false,
     "alternativePricing": null,
     "active": true,
     "visibleToEveryone": true,
     "permissionSystemIds": [],
     "permissionStartDate": null,
     "permissionEndDate": null,
     "endStatus": "None",
     "replacementProductSystemId": "",
     "replacementProductName": "",
     "productVersion": "1",
     "externalId": "",
     "upc": "",
     "mpn": "",
     "inventory": null,
     "leadTime": "",
     "familyCode": "",
     "weight": "",
     "imageLarge": "",
     "descriptionLong": "",
     "executeRulesOnce": false,
     "allowConfigurationImport": false,
     "script": "",
     "configurationTemplate": "",
     "updateAsset": false,
     "alwaysAllowRenewal": false,
     "isSyncedFromBackOffice": true,
     "orderItemType": "Sales",
     "autoRenewalIndicator": "NotRelevantForAutoRenewal",
     "descriptionBuilder": "",
     "userCanEnterQuantity": "",
     "generalItemCategoryGroup": "",
     "hasUsagePricing": null,
     "skipRelatedProductsLoading": false,
     "shippings": [
     {
          "systemId": "Standard_Shipping_cpq",
          "name": "Standard Shipping",
          "expression": ""
     },
     {
          "systemId": "Express_Shipping_cpq",
          "name": "Express Shipping",
          "expression": ""
     },
     {
          "systemId": "UPS_cpq",
          "name": "UPS",
          "expression": ""
     },
     {
          "systemId": "Fedex_cpq",
          "name": "Fedex",
          "expression": ""
     },
     {
          "systemId": "ups_next_day_cpq",
          "name": "ups next day",
          "expression": ""
     }
     ]
     },
     "attributes": null,
     "advancedRules": null,
     "simpleRules": null,
     "productValidationMessages": null,
     "localScripts": null,
     "globalScripts": null,
     "aliasAttributesInfo": null,
     "layout": null,
     "codeMatching": null,
     "translations": null
}

 

Once Product is created, you will receive a response with Id

 

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/product/v1/Products/1056
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

 

To Filter the Product

 

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/product/v1/Products?$filter=systemId eq 'Silver_cpq'
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

 

To get all Products

 

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/product/v1/Products
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

 

 To Retervie Products having Attributes, Product Rules, Product Messages..

 

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/product/v1/Products/309?&$expand=All
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

 

  To Retervie Products having only Attributes

 

###
GET {{new_url}}/api/product/v1/Products/309?&$expand=Attributes 
Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}
Content-Type: application/json

 


API Documentation
https://<yourcpqdomain>.cpq.cloud.sap/webapihelp/index#/ProductsIntegration

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CPQ/08a7929ad06d4680b4f18cb57bc1a1d3/ac872c9ab08f4ccab3825659c7362d32.html

entry.title: Re: Mass SPRO Special Procurement Key config options
entry.content: I guess nobody can understand what you mean here: "Tried to debug T460T ... shows 13000 records". Changes in translatable texts are usually not controlled and correspond to the direct update of one text table, so just make sure by doing an SQL trace (ST05), and then you can be sure that you can do a direct update.

entry.title: Re: Find out if a component of a structure is a structure or a table type
entry.content: Use ->get_components( ) and cast to cl_abap_structdescr, cl_abap_tabledescr and cl_abap_elemdescr.

entry.title: S-Curve
entry.content:
Dear SAP USERS,in planning how we can get S-Curve information from the sap? based on day or week or month.

it will be appriciated if you mentioned all the sections with complete T-Code  

best regards

Afshin

entry.title: Re: SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity Functional Playbook
entry.content:
Dear Parul,

I'm trying to replicate some tests in my test environement. I was trying to use /BSNAGT/UPLOAD_FILE to upload an MT940 Bank Statement message. Is this possible? If so, why is MT940 not appearing in my selection screen option?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP ByDesign Api - Upload Attachment
entry.content:
Hi Harshal - Adapted it to one of our products:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soap:Body>
    <MaterialBundleMaintainRequest_sync_V1 xmlns="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global">
    <Material actionCode="06">
    <InternalID>AD/ADY4618PE</InternalID>
    <AttachmentFolder DocumentListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="false" ActionCode="06">
    <Document PropertyListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="false" ActionCode="01">
    <VisibleIndicator>true</VisibleIndicator>
    <!--Optional:-->
    <CategoryCode>2</CategoryCode>
    <!--Optional
    <TypeCode>10011</TypeCode>:-->
    <!--Optional
    <MIMECode>text/plain</MIMECode>:-->
    <!--Optional:-->
    <Name>Test.txt</Name>
    <!--Optional:-->
    <AlternativeName>Test.txt</AlternativeName>
    <!--Optional:-->
    <FileContent ActionCode="01">
    <!--Optional:-->
    <BinaryObject mimeCode="text/plain" characterSetCode="UTF?">c2FkYXNkc2FkCgphc2Rhc2Rhc2QKCkhlaGVoZWhlICEg</BinaryObject>
    </FileContent>
    </Document>
    </AttachmentFolder>
    </Material>
    </MaterialBundleMaintainRequest_sync_V1>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>
 
.... but didn't show in client unfortuantely 😞

entry.title: Re: Add Custom Context Attributes for SAP Released Event Types
entry.content:
Hi,

It used to be possible to use @event.context.position to create a dynamic topic bus after upgrading to 

SAP_ABA 75I 0001 SAPK-75I01INSAPABA Cross-Application Component I get an error that position is not available anymore. 
Anybody any idea?

regards Erik

entry.title: Re: 3/3 From JavaScript to TypeScript: The Shocking Results of Our SAPUI5 Transformation
entry.content: Nice

entry.title: Integration suite : B2B TPM : XSD not corresponding to B2B output payload
entry.content:
Dear SAP colleagues,

I have a standard SAP IDoc DELVRY07 which does not have the segments like <IDOC> at the beginning neither SEGMENT attributes (see first image). Now the EDI partner would like to have the XSD files of the payloads that Integration suite generates at the output (see second image payload). But I figured out that these SEGMENT attributes and <IDOC> get generated during the ASSEMBLY part during the interchange Step 2 (which is based on the XSD and XSLT pre/post processing files generated automatically when doing your MIG).

What to do ? Should I add the IDOC tag and SEGMENT attributes in the MIG or generate a one-time XSD output from a payload example (but which won't reflect at all the reality bcause there are no minOccurs attrributes and so on..) ? 

What is the best practice to share an XSD File to the EDI partner ?

entry.title: Re: How can I build a sum over an associated table in SAP...
entry.content: aggregation functions like sum() need a group by all the other fields. In your case you need to put a group by tripId. The syntax error is raised because of the missing the group by before the order by. The CDs compiler doesn't raise it as an error but the generated SQL is not valid. Hope it helps.

entry.title: Issue with Legal Entity Transfer for New Employment - from RCM to ONB
entry.content:
Hi,

We have experienced the issue for legal entity transfer scenario (internal hire) where a new onboarding process in not triggered.

We use Employment Profile Selection rule and this step is triggered:

However after clicking on Rehire with New Employment, the process workflow is not triggered.

In BPE monitor we can see the issue with legal entity transfer workflow:

Typical crossboarding and our main process - preonboarding is working fine. We have only the issue with the legal entity transfer scenario.

Do you know maybe what could be the root cause?

 

Thank you for any suggestions,

BR,

Lukasz

entry.title: Re: Services with quantity scale having fixed amount to be calculated graduated not working
entry.content:
Dear @ArcherZhang , could you pls suggest me, Quantity from 1 to 500 = 500 SGD(Fixed Price)
if more than QTY 500 (Eg: 600 ) at that time  QTY 600 * price (1 SGD)= 600 SGD.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Agent Lifecycle Management
entry.content:
Thank you PhillipButts - your answer really cracked the doubt I was struggling with. Helps a lot.

Thank you KameshwarNukala - for going through the question and trying to explain in detail

entry.title: SAP Logon 750 crashes to desktop without errors after installing AMD drivers
entry.content:
I recently upgraded to an RX 7700 XT and decided it was a good time for a fresh Windows install. After setting up all my drivers and applications, I installed SAP Logon 750. However, when I tried to connect, the application immediately disappeared without any error messages.

I tried various troubleshooting steps from online sources, but nothing worked. Eventually, Perplexity suggested checking the GPU drivers, as similar issues had been reported with Nvidia cards. I uninstalled all AMD drivers and software using Revo Uninstaller, rebooted, and to my surprise, SAP Logon remained open, and I could successfully connect to my server.

Unfortunately, as soon as I reinstalled the AMD drivers and Adrenaline software, the problem returned. Do you have any advice on resolving this? My CPU does have integrated graphics, but it's over 12 years old, and I'd really like to use my new GPU.

I hope this is the correct place to post this...

entry.title: SAP Customer Data Cloud Screen-sets handling custom logic in Javascript
entry.content:
Hi All , I am working with screen-sets in CDC for registration, profile updates, and login, and I want to implement custom handling on these screens.

During registration, I would like to trigger a REST API call (Gigya REST API) on the Submit event in JavaScript to perform additional actions.

Is this possible? How can I call accounts.getAccountInfo, and how should I manage authentication parameters?

Many Thanks,

Ruchita

entry.title: Re: Step by Step process to download EDIFACT XSDs from Integration Advisor for B2B Integration in CI
entry.content:
Dear adarshrao_rao,


Because of the ASSEMBLY step (coming from the XSLT pre/post processing), the idoc structure receives additional attributes SEGMENT="1" and IDOC tag during the Step 2 interchange in B2B... 

What is here the best practice to share the standard IDOC structure message (MIG) to my EDI partner when  the interchange payload does not contain the SEGMENT="1" and IDOC tag at time of exporting in the MIG.

 

my question raised: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/integration-suite-b2b-tpm-xsd-not-corresponding-to-b2b-output-payload/qaq-p/14003624

Thanks a lot
Luis

entry.title: Re: Rebate Amount Based on two Different Target Quantitie...
entry.content:
Hi @gvictor , I defined the REBT condition and also added in to the settlement pricing procedure. I guess, as it's a manual condition and hence updated by the settlement program during the settlement run. How to get the REBT in the settlement calculation? I only see REBV condition appearing in the settlement document.

The standard delivered CCM sales rebate solution does not support material specific value scales at item level. It seems, the calculation considers the total business volume REBV (of all materials) at the header level (ignoring the material specific volume) while applying rebate scale eligibility?

entry.title: Re: VENDOR CONSIGNMENT
entry.content: Is there any solution on this requirement,

entry.title: Re: FTP CPI Connectivity failed: SOCKS5 command failed wi...
entry.content: Thanks for your solution! I had also identified the issue— in my case, the FTP admin hadn't set any range. I configured it from 0 to 65K in CC(though I understand that a defined range would be a more secure and sustainable approach), and it started working after that.

entry.title: VENDOR CONSIGNMENT
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a specific requirement on vendor consignment process. My client procures say material X from same vendor morethan 4 to 5 different prices at the same month.

Month      Material    Vendor Price  Qty

March X       ABC       10 USD          10

March  X      ABC        15 USD         15

How we can manage this in vendor consignment ? Limitation is only one price possible in info record in same time.

If we maintain the different prices with different dates in inforecord, During Goods issue time if partial qty is taken for price 10 but for remaining qty price is different then how it will manage in vendor consignment.

looking for better solution.

Regards,

BR
Swetha

entry.title: Archiving: The forgotten hero of S4HANA. The Tool Guide You Want to Have.
entry.content:
Forget robots just showing up – they're now creating and multiplying data robots! Deepseek's arrival is our AI Sputnik moment, a surprise launch into a whole new era. Could Deepseek be our "set-it-and-forget-it" solution for S/4HANA archiving in future ? Imagine: automatic data archiving that slashes costs on cleanup and keeps your S/4HANA projects running lean and mean.

💥Could there be SAP Data's Sputnik Moment? 💥

"Stop fearing your SAP data swamp. What if Deepseek could be the dynamite that blasts SAP Data open, cleaning and mopping the way for a data superhighway? Turn data nightmares into data sweet deep seek dreams?."

While dreams are exciting, let's get down to business. This blog dives into a comparison of different SAP archiving tools, offering a clear perspective on their strengths and weaknesses. Keep in mind, these are my personal insights, independent of any company affiliation. Ultimately, the best tool for your needs requires your careful evaluation.

Background

For example, DeepSeek’scould analyze SAP data logs and suggest which files should be archived based on usage patterns, while DeepSeek’s AI-powered search could instantly pull up archived records using context rather than keywords.. SAP archiving tools like SNP Archiving, OpenText, SAP ILM, and Proceed Group are playing crucial roles in optimizing storage, improving compliance, and maintaining SAP system performance. Let’s break down how these tools stack up against each other based on real-world use cases.

Feeling the weight of years of data slowing down your SAP system? You're not alone. Many businesses struggle with bloated databases, sluggish performance, and the ever-present fear of non-compliance.

But with so many archiving options available, choosing the right one can feel overwhelming. That's where this guide comes in. We'll break down the top contenders – SNP Archiving, Proceed Group, OpenText, SAP ILM, Data Lakes, and In-System Archiving – so you can find the perfect fit for your needs.

Understanding Your Archiving Needs

Before diving into the tools, let's clarify your goals. Ask yourself:

What's slowing us down? Is it slow report generation, long system backups, or something else?

What kind of data are we dealing with? Is it mostly structured data within SAP, or do we have lots of documents, emails, and other unstructured data?

How important is compliance? Are we in a heavily regulated industry with strict data retention requirements?

What's our budget? Archiving solutions range from affordable to enterprise-grade.

Comparing the Contenders

Now, let's meet the archiving all-stars:

1. SNP Archiving: The Streamlined Solution

Overview: SNP is a well-known SAP partner specializing in data management, system migration, and archiving. SNP’s archiving solution is specifically designed to optimize SAP system performance while ensuring compliance with data retention requirements.

Key Features:

SAP-Optimized: SNP focuses on delivering archiving solutions tailored to SAP systems, helping businesses remove old data from live environments and store it in a way that it remains accessible for compliance or auditing.

Automated Archiving: The solution automates the archiving process, making it easier to migrate data from SAP systems to storage systems.

Integration with SAP: Seamless integration with SAP S/4HANA, SAP ECC, and other SAP modules, ensuring minimal disruption to business operations.

Pros:

Designed specifically for SAP environments.

Strong focus on compliance and audit-ability.

Easy integration with other SAP modules.

Cons:

Limited flexibility for non-SAP data.

May not be as versatile for broader, cross-platform archiving needs. 

2. OpenText: The Content Management Powerhouse

Overview: OpenText is one of the leaders in enterprise content management (ECM) and offers comprehensive archiving solutions for SAP users. OpenText’s solutions go beyond simple archiving, incorporating information lifecycle management, document management, and workflow optimization.

Key Features:

Enterprise Content Management (ECM): OpenText provides a broad suite of ECM tools, including document management, records management, and data archiving.

SAP Integration: Seamlessly integrates with SAP applications (such as SAP S/4HANA), helping businesses manage their SAP documents and records efficiently.

Scalability: OpenText’s archiving solution can scale with enterprise growth, offering flexible data storage options for high volumes of information.

Compliance and Security: Strong features around compliance, audit trails, and security, ensuring that all archived data meets regulatory requirements.

Pros:

Rich ECM capabilities beyond simple data archiving.

Extensive support for compliance and security.

Strong SAP integration.

Cons:

Might be overkill for organizations seeking a simple SAP-only archiving solution.

Higher cost due to comprehensive feature set.

3. Proceed Group: Tailored Solutions

Overview: Proceed Group offers archiving solutions that are integrated into SAP environments and focus on optimizing data storage and retrieval, as well as improving overall system performance.

Key Features:

End-to-End Integration: Proceed Group’s solution integrates directly into SAP and enhances the performance of SAP systems by archiving obsolete or redundant data while ensuring the system stays efficient.

Data Segmentation: Allows businesses to archive data in segments, making it easier to manage large datasets while retaining the ability to retrieve specific pieces of information quickly.

Cost-Efficiency: Designed to reduce operational costs by offloading data from expensive, high-performance systems to lower-cost storage solutions.

Pros:

Effective for businesses looking for cost-effective SAP archiving solutions.

Simple integration with SAP landscapes.

Focus on maintaining system performance and accessibility.

Cons:

May not offer as advanced features as other specialized archiving solutions.

4. SAP ILM (Information Lifecycle Management): The Native Solution

Overview: SAP ILM is an SAP-native solution that offers an enterprise-grade approach to managing data throughout its lifecycle. It’s specifically designed to help businesses comply with legal data retention requirements while managing the storage of SAP data.

Key Features:

Data Lifecycle Management: SAP ILM helps businesses manage the entire lifecycle of data, from creation through retention to deletion, ensuring compliance with legal and regulatory requirements.

Archiving and Data Destruction: Features archiving as well as the automated destruction of data when it is no longer required by regulations.

Seamless SAP Integration: ILM integrates natively with SAP systems, including SAP HANA and SAP S/4HANA, ensuring smooth operation without the need for external systems.

Retention Management: Customizable retention policies allow businesses to define how long data should be kept, making it easier to comply with both internal and external requirements.

Pros:

Native integration with SAP systems.

Comprehensive lifecycle management of data.

Strong regulatory compliance features.

Cons:

Focused mainly on SAP environments; not as flexible for non-SAP data.

The learning curve can be steep for users unfamiliar with SAP.

5. Data Lakes: The Data Insight Reservoir

Overview: A Data Lake is an evolving concept in data storage, where data is stored in its raw form in a large, centralized repository. Although it’s not an archiving solution in the traditional sense, data lakes are increasingly being used for long-term storage and analysis of big data.

Key Features:

Storage of Raw Data: Data lakes store data in its native format (structured, semi-structured, or unstructured), which means all data is available for future analysis without needing to be processed first.

Scalability: Data lakes are built to scale horizontally, handling vast amounts of data with low-cost storage solutions, such as Hadoop or cloud-based services like AWS S3.

Data Exploration: Provides businesses with the ability to run advanced analytics and machine learning algorithms on large datasets without the need for complex data transformation processes.

Flexibility: Can store data from multiple sources, including SAP and non-SAP systems, and provide analytics and insights.

Pros:

Ideal for handling large-scale structured, unstructured, or semi-structured data.

Highly flexible and scalable.

Can be used for data exploration and advanced analytics.

Cons:

Not designed specifically for archiving; lacks out-of-the-box features for compliance or regulatory management.

Requires specialized skills for managing and querying large datasets.

Potentially high storage and data management costs without proper governance.

6. In-System Archiving: The Lightweight Option

Overview: In-System Archiving stores archived data within the SAP system itself (database or storage infrastructure), simplifying management in SAP-centric environments.

Key Features:

Data Stored in SAP

Optimized for SAP Performance

Transparency

Simplified Data Management

Pros:

Seamless SAP Integration

Lower Costs for Smaller Systems

Compliance and Security

Simplicity

Cons:

Scalability limitations for large data volumes

Limited flexibility for non-SAP environments

Less advanced analytics capabilities

The optimal choice for your organisation will depend on a variety of factors, including the size of your company, the volume of data you need to archive, your compliance requirements, and the complexity of your IT environment and hope this guide is useful for you as a starting point.

entry.title: Vendor Consignment stock in transit
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a specific requirement on vendor consignment process. My client doesn't have the storage in their premises, so they want to introduce the Two step Stock in transit in place of Mov type 411k as FI document need to generate once received at warehouse.

Process         Vendor consignment     Stock intransit             warehouse 

Good issue               10

Stockintransit                                       10

GR at warehouse                                                                   10

How we can manage this in vendor consignment ? 

 

Looking for better solution.

Regards,

BR
Swetha

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Greetings from Mexico

My name is Daniel. I have been a consultant for over 14 years, with experience in Financial processes in the FICO, BW, BPC, SAC, and GR modules.

Best regards!

entry.title: Re: CAP Java: How to connect to PostgreSQL on BTP from BAS
entry.content:
Postgres DB (from BTP) host is not accessible from public internet, not also from BAS. It is only accessible from the subaccount where it is subscribed. So you have to create a tunnel to a running CF application to access it and reconfigure access to the DB to use localhost on the port where the tunnel is opened. The setup is same as mentioned in the documentation, note step 4 in Export Data from PostgreSQL Service Instance.

There are some conveniences for nodeJS: Overwrite Cloud Service Credentials .

entry.title: Re: CAP where clause to filter dates in an As Projection...
entry.content:
Try using pseudo variable $now.

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/domain-modeling#pseudo-variables

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part II: Provisioning to BTP and S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear @MartinRaepple

Fantastic blog!

Gabi

entry.title: Re: connection options between S/4 Hana Private Cloud and...
entry.content:
Hi,
There is framework provided by SAP to replicate data from SAP Successfactors to SAP S/4 Hana BIB(Business Integration Builder).
There are some prerequisites to enable this framework in SAP S/4 Hana and CPI middleware can be leveraged for this integration.
You can find the implementation guide in below link:
Organizational Object Replication from SAP SF to S/4 Hana: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_INTEGRATION_TO_SAP_BUSINESS_SUITE/975037a4b03f49919fdaf29b3da1c2b7/1097a96c791d42e2b7788d0310fe1d0b.html
Employee and Org Assignment replication from SAP SF to S/4 Hana: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_INTEGRATION_TO_SAP_BUSINESS_SUITE/b22a1d132dfa438698bceadbafd7a57d/42a9595f66524499a925ac5da92e5ebd.html?locale=en-US

Please let me know if you have any queries.

entry.title: Re: How to setup Time Evaluation in Time Tracking
entry.content:
Timo-

This blog is extremely useful, particularly the information on the valuation types!

My question is why has this material never made it into the implementation guide? Right now I would call this blog the de facto primary documentation for Time Tracking. While I LOVE the content, a lengthy blog is not the optimal way to fully document a process as complex as time valuation.

entry.title: Re: Prepare for the Future: Major SAP SuccessFactors Changes Coming in 2025 and 2026
entry.content:
Hi, Where I can find more information on this topic - 

  • Org Chart and Role-Based Permissions (RBP): Traditional Org Charts and the existing RBP system will be deprecated by May 2025, transitioning to an updated model for improved user experience and securityMore or less the other items are not a surprised as they have been announced earlier in one of other aspect. However the org chart and the RBP is something I have never seen as items. Regards, Maria

entry.title: Unable to access Cloud Integration tenant APIs (like MessageProcessingLogs) using inbound Oauth 2.0
entry.content:
Experts - 

I am trying to access the Cloud Integration tenant APIs like IntegrationPackages, MessageProcessingLogs, etc using an inbound oauth connection while passing client credentials details. I get the following error message -

404 Not Found: Requested route ('<host_name>') does not exist. At first glance it looks like there is something wrong with the host name url. But hold your horses....!

Let me detail the steps that I followed to achieve this - 

1. Created an entitlement for Integration suite in my subaccount

2. Subscribed to the Integration suite service. 

3. Added the Roles to my user. 

4. Logged into the Integration suite application and added Cloud Integration capability. Added the additional roles to my user.

5. Accessed CI, created an iflow.

6. Created a Process Integration runtime service instance in the same subaccount as my Integration suite with 'integration-flow' plan. the service instance has 'ESBMessaging.send' role attached to it. 

7. Created a service key of type client-credentials. 

8. Configured a GET call in postman using the oauth2.0 authorization method with the clientID, clientsercret, token url. Created a new token - which was successful by the way.

9. Configured the auth data to be added to the request headers, made sure the prefix 'Bearer' appears in the auth header and fired off the request to https://<<url from service key>>/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogs?$filter=Status eq 'COMPLETED'

.......... and ...... boom - the error. 

 

Response Header

cache-control: no-cache, no-store
content-type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
x-cf-routererror: unknown_route
x-content-type-options: nosniff
date: Sat, 01 Feb 2025 23:54:28 GMT
content-length: 115
strict-transport-security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload;

What do you guys think it can be? Any help will be greatly appreciated. 

Thanks

Kriba

entry.title: Re: SAP Apphaus: The Official Learning Journey For Business AI Workshops!
entry.content: Thanks!! 🙂

entry.title: Re: why does Fiori LeaveRequets -Onbehalf function conver...
entry.content:
If you go deep into the RPTARQPOST code, you may find a hint. The login is in the backend side, not Fiori frontend side.

https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/message?q=RPTARQPOST%20AND%20informed&noSynonym=false&collapse_discussion=true

entry.title: Re: CPI: Groovy[HashMap] Data Retrieval Issue
entry.content:
Hi @rasjoshi @raihan_siddiqui,

I wasn't using the import headers below as I was trying to fix the warning thrown by the latest CI feature. So It wasn't working for me.

 

import java.util.HashMap;
import groovy.xml.*;

Thanks a lot for the help, I modified the code as below as per your suggestions!!

import groovy.json.JsonSlurper
import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import groovy.xml.*

def Message processData(Message message) {
	
	def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String);
	def map = message.getProperties();
	def hmap1 = map.get("hmap_PayScaleArea");
	def hmap2 = map.get("hmap_PayScaleGroup");
	def hmap3 = map.get("hmap_PayScaleLevel");
	def hmap4 = map.get("hmap_cust_GlobalKey");
	def hmap5 = map.get("hmap_cust_CompensationJobCode");
	def hmap6 = map.get("hmap_cust_GlobalIdentifier");
	def hmap7 = map.get("hmap_FODepartment");
	def hmap8 = map.get("hmap_Position");
	def hmap9 = map.get("hmap_Country");
	def hmap10 = map.get("hmap_PerPersonal");

	def CE_Payload = map.get("CE_Payload");  
   	
   	def Root = new XmlParser().parseText(CE_Payload);
    Root.CompoundEmployee.each{CE ->
	    CE.person.employment_information.each{EMP->
		    EMP.job_information.each{JOB->
		        def payScaleAreaCode = JOB.payScaleArea.text();
		        def payScaleGroupCode = JOB.payScaleGroup.text();
		        def payScaleLevelCode = JOB.payScaleLevel.text();
		        def cust_GlobalKeyCode = JOB.custom_string15.text();
		        def cust_CompensationJobCode = JOB.custom_string26.text();
		        def cust_GlobalIdentifierCode = JOB.custom_string16.text();
		        def FODepartmentCode = JOB.department.text();
		        def PositionCode = JOB.position.text();
		        def CountryCode = JOB.company_territory_code.text();

		        if (payScaleAreaCode && hmap1.containsKey(payScaleAreaCode)){
                    JOB.payScaleArea[0].value = "${payScaleAreaCode}:${hmap1.get(payScaleAreaCode)}"
		        }
		        if (payScaleGroupCode && hmap2.containsKey(payScaleGroupCode)){
                    JOB.payScaleGroup[0].value = "${payScaleGroupCode}:${hmap2.get(payScaleGroupCode)}"
		        }
		        if (payScaleLevelCode && hmap3.containsKey(payScaleLevelCode)){
                    JOB.payScaleLevel[0].value = "${payScaleLevelCode}:${hmap3.get(payScaleLevelCode)}"
		        }
		        if (cust_GlobalKeyCode && hmap4.containsKey(cust_GlobalKeyCode)){
                    JOB.custom_string15[0].value = "${cust_GlobalKeyCode}:${hmap4.get(cust_GlobalKeyCode)}"
		        }
		        if (cust_CompensationJobCode && hmap5.containsKey(cust_CompensationJobCode)){
                    JOB.custom_string26[0].value = "${cust_CompensationJobCode}:${hmap5.get(cust_CompensationJobCode)}"
		        }
		        if (cust_GlobalIdentifierCode && hmap6.containsKey(cust_GlobalIdentifierCode)){
                    JOB.custom_string16[0].value = "${cust_GlobalIdentifierCode}:${hmap6.get(cust_GlobalIdentifierCode)}"
		        }
		        if (FODepartmentCode && hmap7.containsKey(FODepartmentCode)){
                    JOB.department[0].value = "${FODepartmentCode}:${hmap7.get(FODepartmentCode)}"
		        }
		        if (PositionCode && hmap8.containsKey(PositionCode)){
                    JOB.position[0].value = "${PositionCode}:${hmap8.get(PositionCode)}"
		        }		        
		        if (CountryCode && hmap9.containsKey(CountryCode)){
                    JOB.company_territory_code[0].value = "${CountryCode}:${hmap9.get(CountryCode)}"
		        }
		    }
		    EMP.job_relation.each{JOB_R->
		        def PerPersonalCode = JOB_R.user_id.text();
		        
		        if (PerPersonalCode && hmap10.containsKey(PerPersonalCode)){
                    JOB_R.user_id[0].value = "${PerPersonalCode}:${hmap10.get(PerPersonalCode)}"
		        }
		    }
		}
    }
	message.setBody(XmlUtil.serialize(Root));
   	return message;
}

I'm unsure about the options.

entry.title: 回复： Setting up Planning Time Fence in MRP

entry.title: Re: Can I change the valuation type from the MRP Generate...
entry.content: Dear Customer, The handover process is for the approval process, the value of field cannot be changed here.

entry.title: Re: Assigning WBS elements to a Service Order
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Plants Setup
entry.content: Dear @sagnikch, the setting should be determined basing on the business request, the plant is a valuation area, in case the valution in the same location is in the same valution area, then there is no need to create more than 1 plant, create storage location to manage the stock is enough.

entry.title: Re: Vendor Consignment stock in transit
entry.content:
i do have a basic question--if you do not have storage for consignments --and you are not purchasing them as consignments that why is there need to create a PO as consignment and introduce this complexity -- you would be much better situation if you create a regular PO -- then use 107 or 109 goods movements 

I do not believe there is not something known as stock in transit for consignment -but I think what you could do is--configure your 101+K in say that when you perform 101+K--, the system posts 2nd movement 411+K so stock moves from vendor consignment stock to your own stock as soon as you receive it. I have not done this but I think the following ways to meet this requirement

1. Trigger second movement type using output on goods movement that may create an idoc --this may require some BADIs implementation 

2. Create a custom program that runs based -on the frequency you can agree with your customer --to post 411+K

3. Maybe a workflow event that detects 101+K and then performs 411+K ( using Goods movement BAPI)

entry.title: Re: Dual control sensitive fields for vendor master in sap
entry.content: Please remove the tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: how to disable VMS for DSD shipment or How to config it?
entry.content:
hello guys, we are using DSD Module for shipment in our firm and we have an issue when i enter vehicle sap code (made with IE01 and filled dsd info with ie02) we have following error whic i guess is related to VMS Module which we didn't activate, if it possible tell me how to disbale this for Shipment or how to config it.

error: Could not read the master data of vehicle 10000012

entry.title: Re: Vendor Consignment stock in transit
entry.content: Dear Jagdeep Thanks for the details given, Yes, There is no space requirement to keep the vendor consignment but still client wants to use it this Vendor consignment. Only requirment for them once 101K is happened they want to show Two Step Procedure for Consignment Process instead of 411 k mov type As the stock will move from vendor which will take 5 to 6 days in transit and Fi document should be triggered while doing GR at warehouse. BR Swetha.

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Data Cloud Screen-sets handling custom l...
entry.content:
Hi Rvanjari,

You can listen to the onAfterSubmit event and call gigya.accounts.getAccountInfo({callback: fn}) to retrieve user data.

The SDK handles authentication automatically, so there is no need to pass any parameters.

For a more robust approach, consider using gigya.accounts.addEventHandlers({onLogin: fn}), which triggers on any login action, regardless of the screen where it originated.

You can find more details here:
Handling Authentication Events – SAP Customer Data Cloud

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Sending eDocument Inbound Messages to Third Party non...
entry.content: Hi Martin, how to setup custom solution in public cloud, is there any way?

entry.title: Re: How to display an attribute of a class, which belongs...

entry.title: Re: How to display an attribute of a class, which belongs...
entry.content: @ulrich_mhrke, So how can I access the instance of the class (for instance attribute)?

entry.title: Successful First Online Meeting for SAP Community Vancouver!
entry.content:
We are thrilled to share that our first online meeting for the SAP Community Vancouver went smoothly and was a great success!

We had the pleasure of being joined by four enthusiastic members:

  • Moldir Abdikerim
  • Cherine Cañete Simbajon
  • Prabakaran Ganesan
  • Vellaikamban Balaji


The session kicked off with each of us introducing ourselves and sharing how SAP has become an integral part of our career journeys. It was inspiring to hear everyone’s unique experiences and the diverse ways SAP has impacted our professional lives.

We also took some time to get to know more about the SAP Community and the various resources and opportunities it offers.

The session concluded on a high note with a giveaway of two free e-book vouchers from SAP PRESS, adding an extra layer of excitement to our meeting.

A big thank you to everyone who participated and made this event memorable. We look forward to many more engaging and insightful sessions in the future!

Stay tuned for updates on our next meeting.

#SAPCommunity #Vancouver #Networking #CareerGrowth #SAPPRESS

entry.title: approval template did not affect some users
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our client using SAP B1 version 9 having a problem with their approval. 

Approval condition is if the customers Sales Order is over their limit then the document will go through approval process. When logged in with marketing user, sales order document that over credit limit did not go through approval process. If i tried creating SO using manager account, the document successfully go through the approval process. 

Any settings or authorization that i need to check?

entry.title: How to export SAP Dynamic forms from one BTP Sub-account and import it to an another BTP sub-account
entry.content:
Hello community,

We have designed many Dynamic forms on one of our BTP sub-account and as part of the project execution we are now moving to another BTP sub-account. While I can export all of the forms successfully from the 'Forms Adminstration' page of my previous BTP sub-account, I could not import them in the new BTP sub-account as the 'Import' button is always disabled on the 'Forms Administration' page.

I could not find any relevant documentation that talks about importing the existing forms. Could you please let me know how it needs to be done?

 

 

Regards,

Madan

entry.title: Re: Send charges, surcharges and tax information to Ariba Business Network
entry.content:
Hi @gellper 

Thank you so much for sharing such a comprehensive article.

We are working on a similar requirement currently. Could you please also guide regarding the following queries:

1. Do we need to, first of all, extend the IDoc ARBCIG_ORDERS to include the segment E1EDP05 before performing the enhancement or just perform the enhancement directly within the mentioned user exit?

2. Our internal ABAP team performed the enhancement under the mentioned user exit - though it did not include the segment E1EDP05 in the IDoc. Are there any other steps/pre-requisites we might be missing?

Any insight from your end would be highly appreciated.

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: SAP Logon 750 crashes to desktop without errors after installing AMD drivers
entry.content: SCM is not the right place to post, but I've forwarded to the moderator to move it.

entry.title: Can SAP use different Foreign exchange rate at accounting document level?
entry.content:
I have monthly amounts for January - March for Income (EUR) and Expense (PLN). However I do quarterly billing in SAP in April. 

As per standard, SAP SD will calculate Expense/AP amount using April month exchange rate and create a single accounting document. i.e. Billing date exchange rate.

Is it somehow possible that SAP calculates the Expense/AP amount using monthly rates (I can provide month as a feed in upload template) and still create a single accounting document?

To summarize - can SAP use transaction period exchange rate instead of billing date exchange rate and still create single accounting document for the quarterly billing?
